scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cataloga/types && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/schema && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/schemas && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/source-contract && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/storage && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/source-git && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/source-aws && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/source-onprem && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/identity && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/drift && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/topology && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/query && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/ingest && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/core && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/validator && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/bundle && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/search && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/managed-hosting && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/renderer && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/sample-data && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/api && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/cli && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/worker && npm run build --workspace @cataloga/web
scripts.test:e2e:web: npm run build && npm exec --workspace @cataloga/cli cataloga -- export --registry packages/sample-data/registry --out apps/web/dist/bundle.json > /dev/null && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:e2e:web
